mapper.select:
SELECT log_no AS "logNo" , user_id AS "userId" , user_name AS "userName" , user_name AS "userNm" , action_type AS "actionType" , access_ip AS "accessIp" , TO_CHAR(log_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "date" , TO_CHAR(log_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "logDt" FROM docs_audit_log WHERE 1 = 1
AND user_id ILIKE '%' || #{userId} || '%'
AND user_name ILIKE '%' || #{userName} || '%'
AND user_name ILIKE '%' || #{userNm} || '%'
AND action_type ILIKE '%' || #{actionType} || '%'
AND access_ip ILIKE '%' || #{accessIp} || '%'
AND log_dt >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{startDt} || ' 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND log_dt < TO_TIMESTAMP(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 day'
ORDER BY log_no
ORDER BY user_id
ORDER BY user_name
ORDER BY action_type
ORDER BY access_ip
ORDER BY log_dt
ORDER BY log_dt
ASC
DESC
, log_no DESC
LIMIT CAST(#{size} AS INTEGER) OFFSET ((CAST(#{page} AS INTEGER) - 1) * CAST(#{size} AS INTEGER))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM docs_audit_log WHERE 1 = 1
AND user_id ILIKE '%' || #{userId} || '%'
AND user_name ILIKE '%' || #{userName} || '%'
AND user_name ILIKE '%' || #{userNm} || '%'
AND action_type ILIKE '%' || #{actionType} || '%'
AND access_ip ILIKE '%' || #{accessIp} || '%'
AND log_dt >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{startDt} || ' 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND log_dt < TO_TIMESTAMP(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 day'
